products.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
products.description: Over-ear headphones with high-fidelity sound, noise isolation, and up to 20 hours of battery life. Comfortable for long listening sessions.

products.name: UltraSlim Laptop 14"
products.description: Lightweight laptop with a 14-inch display, fast performance, and all-day battery life. Ideal for work, school, and everyday use.

products.name: True Wireless Earbuds
products.description: Compact earbuds with clear sound, touch controls, and a portable charging case. Perfect for commuting and workouts.

products.name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
products.description: Responsive mechanical keys with RGB backlighting. Designed for gaming precision and comfortable typing.

products.name: Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
products.description: Smooth tracking with an ergonomic design that reduces hand strain. Reliable wireless connection and long battery life.

products.name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
products.description: Compact speaker with powerful sound and deep bass. Water-resistant design makes it great for travel and outdoor use.

products.name: HD Webcam 1080p
products.description: Full HD webcam with built-in microphone for clear video calls and streaming. Plug-and-play compatibility.

products.name: 10" Tablet Device
products.description: Sleek tablet with a vibrant display, fast performance, and long battery life. Great for browsing, streaming, and apps.

products.name: External SSD 1TB
products.description: High-speed portable storage with fast data transfer and durable design. Ideal for backups and large files.

products.name: Smart Fitness Watch
products.description: Track steps, heart rate, and daily activity with a sleek, lightweight smartwatch. Syncs easily with your phone.

products.name: Noise Cancelling Earbuds
products.description: In-ear headphones with active noise cancellation and immersive sound. Great for travel and focused listening.

products.name: USB-C Multiport Adapter
products.description: Expand your laptop's connectivity with HDMI, USB, and charging ports in one compact hub.
